description: Dungeon stone floor — a clean readable Kenney Roguelike Dungeon slab (public/assets/MANIFEST.json#kenney-roguelike-dungeon, tilemaps/kenney-dungeon.png, 16px cells on a 17px stride). Replaces the near-black .pix stone-floor that read as unlit static; this warm light-grey slab is legible at game scale. The 2×1 field samples the two plain-floor cells (cols 9-10, row 2) so the floor varies subtly without a single repeated cell; the cracked/shattered/ratmarked variants carry the wear.
